graveyard_techniques.technique: T_eff = P/(n_e * B_T^2 * R^3) with geometry factor sqrt(I_p * B_T / n_e)
graveyard_techniques.failure_mode: DIMENSIONAL_CATASTROPHE_FOR_TOKAMAKS — T_eff ~ 1e-15 freezes lattice, all tokamak predictions ~ 1e-8s instead of 0.1-0.9s. Geometry factor sqrt(I_p*B_T/n_e) ~ 1e-6 makes it worse. PARTIAL SUCCESS: Stellarators W7-X=21% error, LHD=31% error because I_p=0 zeros the bad factor. FIX: Replace sqrt(I_p*B_T/n_e) with q_edge = 5*a^2*B_T*kappa/(R*I_p) — dimensionless, O(1). Stellarator formula tau_E ~ R^2 * epsilon^0.58 / n_states already works.

graveyard_techniques.technique: T_eff = P/(n_e * V_plasma) direct power balance temperature
graveyard_techniques.failure_mode: DIMENSIONAL_CATASTROPHE — T_eff ~ 1e-14 to 1e-15 for all machines. Boltzmann weights exp(-d/T_eff) all collapse to 0. Lattice completely frozen. Spectral gap = 0. All predictions = 0.

graveyard_techniques.technique: T_eff = 1/ln(S) Lundquist number temperature with fitted coefficients
graveyard_techniques.failure_mode: PARAMETER_FITTING — Used L-BFGS-B to fit 5 coefficients to Basin A data. This is curve fitting, not BVP derivation. Stellarator predictions wildly off (W7-X: 1.92s vs 0.15s, 12x overshoot). The fitting overfits tokamak regime and does not transfer.

breakthrough_signal.hypothesis: Framework is correct for stellarators. Tokamak extension broken at I_p coupling. Need dimensionless I_p factor that is O(1) not O(1e-6). The natural candidate is the cylindrical safety factor q_edge = 5*a^2*B_T*kappa / (R*I_p).
breakthrough_signal.stellarator_formula_that_works: tau_E = R^2 * epsilon^0.58 * kappa^0.78 / (n_states * chi_0) — no plasma current term
